Table 13: Translation from Cir to Cvn. Notation: cp(𝑓 , 𝑠) = control place; rp(𝑟 ) = resource place; wp(𝑠), ra(𝑠) = wait / reacquire places. “→” separates inputs from outputs. Operations not listed (read, load, nop, call with body, spawn_async, await) generate a single Sequential transition cp(𝑓 , sid) → cp(𝑓 , sid′) with no resource interaction.
